array.string: cd "/path/to/2026 Technosignatures" && .venv/bin/techno-search background-run-once --ledger-path artifacts/background_search_ledger.json --reviewed-log-path artifacts/background_reviewed_log.json --needs-follow-up-log-path artifacts/background_needs_follow_up_log.json --code-commit "$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo not-recorded)" --acknowledge-local-run
